target.title: #92562: fix(session): preserve user-set behavior overrides across implicit daily rollover
target.body:
## Summary

User-set behavior overrides (`/think medium`, `/verbose`, `/reasoning`, `ttsAuto`) set with commands are silently dropped after an implicit daily session reset, requiring the user to re-apply them after every reset boundary. They only survived explicit `/new` or `/reset`.

## Root Cause

In `src/auto-reply/reply/session.ts`, the carryover of behavior overrides (`thinkingLevel`, `verboseLevel`, `traceLevel`, `reasoningLevel`, `ttsAuto`) was gated on `resetTriggered === true`, which is only set for explicit commands (`/new`, `/reset`). Implicit daily/idle stale rollovers create a new session from the existing entry but never copy these fields.

Model/auth overrides were already fixed for the same problem in #90119 â€” the same pattern (`resolveResetPreservedSelection` runs unconditionally for all rollovers) just hadn't been extended to behavior overrides.

## Real behavior proof

### behavior
Move behavior-override preservation from the `resetTriggered`-gated block to the unconditional entry-preservation block so daily/idle rollovers also carry forward thinkingLevel, verboseLevel, traceLevel, reasoningLevel, and ttsAuto â€” matching the existing model-override fix from #90119.

### environment
- OS: Linux 4.19.112-2.el8.x86_64
- Runtime: Node.js v22.22.1
- Setup: openclaw development workspace

### steps
1. Add regression test that sets behavior overrides on a stale session entry (48h old) and calls `initSessionState` with a plain message (not `/new`)
2. Verify the new session preserves thinkingLevel, verboseLevel, traceLevel, reasoningLevel, ttsAuto
3. Run the full session test suite

### observedResult

**Test suite output:**
```
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  110 passed (110)
   Start at  08:16:44
   Duration  10.04s
```

110 tests pass, including the new regression test `preserves user-set behavior overrides across an implicit daily stale rollover (#92562)` that verifies all 5 behavior override fields survive the implicit rollover when `resetTriggered === false`.

**Regression test verifies:**
- `thinkingLevel` preserved: `"medium"`
- `verboseLevel` preserved: `2`
- `traceLevel` preserved: `1`
- `reasoningLevel` preserved: `"high"`
- `ttsAuto` preserved: `true`

**Key change** (from `session.ts`):
```
// Before: gated on resetTriggered, so daily rollovers dropped overrides
if (resetTriggered && entry) {
  persistedThinking = entry.thinkingLevel;
  ...
}

// After: behavior overrides survive ANY rollover, like model overrides
if (entry) {
  persistedThinking = entry.thinkingLevel;
  persistedVerbose = entry.verboseLevel;
  ...
}
```

## Regression Test Plan

- [x] `pnpm test -- --run src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts` passes (110 tests)
- [x] New test `preserves user-set behavior overrides across an implicit daily stale rollover (#92562)` passes
- [x] Existing `preserves a user model override across an implicit daily stale rollover (#90119)` unchanged
- [x] Existing `clears an auto-fallback model override on an implicit daily stale rollover (#90119)` unchanged
- [x] Change is minimal (remove `resetTriggered` gate, add regression test)

---

*AI-assisted: built with Claude Code*
target.author: lzyyzznl
